corner-none.$description: No rounding — full-bleed elements, edge-to-edge banners, explicitly sharp components. | ai-group:roundness

corner-xsmall.$description: Barely rounded — for very subtle softening, almost-sharp aesthetic. | ai-group:roundness

corner-small.$description: Slight rounding — default for interactive controls (buttons, inputs) in the default personality. | ai-group:roundness

corner-medium.$description: Moderate rounding — default for cards and container surfaces. | ai-group:roundness

corner-large.$description: Prominent rounding — modals, popovers, overlays in default personality. | ai-group:roundness

corner-xlarge.$description: Strong rounding — interactive controls in rounded personality, container surfaces in bubbly. | ai-group:roundness

corner-2xlarge.$description: Very strong rounding — used in bubbly/expressive personality modes. | ai-group:roundness

corner-full.$description: Fully circular/pill — chips, badges, avatar images, toggle switches. | ai-group:roundness

stroke-hairline.$description: Hairline border — structural dividers between list rows, table cells. Barely perceptible by design. | ai-group:weight

stroke-thin.$description: Standard border width — interactive form elements at rest: inputs, selects, card outlines. Universal default. | ai-group:weight

stroke-medium.$description: Medium border — slightly more prominent outlines, active states where extra visibility is needed. | ai-group:weight

stroke-bold.$description: Bold border — focus rings, active input borders, strong emphasis outlines. | ai-group:weight

radius-interactive.$description: Corner radius of all interactive controls — buttons, inputs, selects, dropdowns. The single biggest lever for roundness personality. Changing this shifts product character from sharp/corporate to soft/modern. | ai-group:roundness | ai-impact:high | ai-constraint:must be <= radius.container

radius-container.$description: Corner radius of card-like containers — cards, panels, info boxes. Should always be >= radius.interactive to maintain visual harmony. | ai-group:roundness | ai-impact:high | ai-constraint:must be >= radius.interactive

radius-overlay.$description: Corner radius of floating surfaces — modals, bottom sheets, popovers, tooltips. Larger radius signals softness and approachability. | ai-group:roundness | ai-impact:medium

radius-tag.$description: Corner radius of chips, badges, tags — fully rounded pill shape by default. Reducing creates rectangular labels. Only change if brand calls for square badges. | ai-group:roundness | ai-impact:medium

radius-avatar.$description: Corner radius for user avatars and profile images — circular by default. Avoid changing unless brand explicitly calls for square avatars. | ai-group:roundness | ai-impact:low

radius-image.$description: Corner radius for media thumbnails and content images. Matches radius.interactive by default. | ai-group:roundness | ai-impact:low

radius-none.$description: Explicitly no rounding — for full-bleed elements that should never have rounded corners regardless of personality mode. | ai-group:locked | ai-locked:true

focus-ring-width.$description: Width of outer accessibility focus ring. Minimum 2px per WCAG 2.4.11. Never reduce below 2px. | ai-group:locked | ai-locked:true | ai-constraint:minimum 2px WCAG requirement

focus-ring-offset.$description: Gap between focused element edge and focus ring. 2px creates clear visual separation. | ai-group:locked | ai-locked:true
